title: Lung Cancer Genetic Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
MCLNM: MayoComplete Lung Cancer Mutations, Next-Generation Sequencing, Tumor: Clinical and Interpretive; [cited 2022 Sep 19]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://www.mayocliniclabs.com/test-catalog/overview/616487#Clinical-and-Interpretive 
MedlinePlus [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): National Library of Medicine (US); ALK gene; [updated 2011 Mar 1; cited 2022 Sep 19]; [about 2 screens]. Available from: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/gene/alk/ 
MedlinePlus [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): National Library of Medicine (US); EGFR gene; [updated 2017 Dec 1; cited 2022 Sep 19]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/gene/egfr/ 
MedlinePlus [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): National Library of Medicine (US); KRAS gene; [updated 2017 Dec 1; cited 2022 Sep 19]; [about 7 screens]. Available from: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/gene/kras/ 
MedlinePlus [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): National Library of Medicine (US); Lung Cancer; [updated 2017 Dec 1; cited 2022 Sep 19]; [about 8 screens]. Available from: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/condition/lung-cancer/ 
MedlinePlus [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): National Library of Medicine (US); What is a gene variant and how do variants occur?; [updated 2021 Mar 25; cited 2022 Sep 19]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/understanding/mutationsanddisorders/genemutation/ 
Merck Manual Consumer Version
